reasoning: Based on strong evidence that the Federal Reserve is expected to CUT interest rates at the Oct 28-29, 2025 FOMC meeting, with Fed Funds rate projected to move to 3.75%-4.00% range. Multiple sources confirm market expectations for rate cuts, with Fed's own projections showing further reductions through 2025. The 6-month treasury bill rate was 3.690% on Oct 16 and will likely decrease after the expected rate cut. However, uncertainty increases with forecast horizon: 1 week out (Nov 2) has very low probability of increase as cuts just took effect; 1 month out (Nov 25) allows slight chance of rebound; 3 months out (Jan 24) has higher uncertainty as economic conditions could change.
